signals.headline: SEC Safe Harbor Guidance for DeFi and Schwab Spot ETH/BTC Launch Confirmation | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC Safe Harbor Guidance for DeFi and Schwab Spot ETH/BTC Launch Confirmation | YES | HIGH confidence**  
On April 14, 2026, the SEC released safe harbor guidance for DeFi front ends, viewed as a positive regulatory signal for altcoins including Ethereum[2]. Charles Schwab simultaneously confirmed plans to launch spot Bitcoin and Ethereum buying for its $12 trillion brokerage assets by Q2 2026, ma
matched_markets: Ethereum Up or Down - April 23, 2:30AM-2:35AM ET

signals.headline: **Luke Kennard’s playoff debut**: The veteran guard scored 27 points in the Lakers' Game 1 win over the Houston Rockets
signals.raw: **Luke Kennard’s playoff debut**: The veteran guard scored 27 points in the Lakers' Game 1 win over the Houston Rockets on April 18, 2026—the second-most in Lakers playoff debut history—though he is not a rookie.[1]

signals.headline: **Lakers' Game 1 victory**: Lakers beat Rockets (without Kevin Durant), with LeBron James posting 19 points and 13 assis
signals.raw: **Lakers' Game 1 victory**: Lakers beat Rockets (without Kevin Durant), with LeBron James posting 19 points and 13 assists; no rookie central to this.[2][4]

signals.headline: **G League update**: Lakers draft pick Dalton Knecht shone as South Bay Lakers advanced to G League Western Conference F
signals.raw: **G League update**: Lakers draft pick Dalton Knecht shone as South Bay Lakers advanced to G League Western Conference Finals after beating Rio Grande Valley Vipers (112-97), but this is minor league and pre-semifinals at NBA level (series starts Sunday).[3]
